{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/74800891?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/therawdev/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/therawdev/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/therawdev/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/therawdev/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/therawdev", "id": 74800891, "login": "therawdev", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjc0ODAwODkx", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/therawdev/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/therawdev/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/therawdev/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/therawdev/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/therawdev/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/therawdev", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-55883", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:H/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-345", "name": "Insufficient Verification of Data Authenticity"}], "description": "## Summary
The Tilt HUD WebSocket (`/ws/view`) is gated by a CSRF token, but the token is served by an unauthenticated endpoint and the upgrader accepts any client that omits an `Origin` header. When the HUD is network-exposed, an attacker can open the HUD stream and read the developer's session state.

## Details
The upgrader accepts a connection when the `csrf` query parameter matches a process-wide token (`websocketCSRFToken`). That token is served as `text/plain` by an unauthenticated handler (`WebsocketToken`, mounted at `/api/websocket_token`), so any reachable caller can fetch it and connect to `/ws/view?csrf=<token>`. When the parameter does not match, the upgrader falls back to a same-origin check that returns true when the `Origin` header is absent, so a non-browser client that omits `Origin` is accepted anyway. The token has no per-session binding.

## Impact
An attacker who can reach the HUD listener can open the HUD WebSocket and receive the full view stream — session state, Tiltfile contents, resource statuses, and continued updates — defeating the intended anti-CSWSH protection.

### Conditions for exploitation
- Affected version in `>= 0.24.0, <= 0.37.3`.
- HUD bound to a non-loopback address (`tilt up --host 0.0.0.0`, or `TILT_HOST` set).
- Network reachability to the listener (default port `10350`).

### Not affected
- The default loopback-only bind is not reachable from the network.

## Workarounds
Use the default loopback bind (omit `--host`, unset `TILT_HOST`). No complete workaround short of upgrading for non-loopback deployments.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00222, "percentile": 0.12741}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-6m68-r693-78qx", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T13:53:35Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-6m68-r693-78qx", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-6m68-r693-78qx"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-55883"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-19T13:53:35Z", "references": ["https://github.com/tilt-dev/tilt/security/advisories/GHSA-6m68-r693-78qx", "https://github.com/tilt-dev/tilt/pull/6776", "https://github.com/tilt-dev/tilt/releases/tag/v0.37.4", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-6m68-r693-78qx"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/tilt-dev/tilt/security-advisories/GHSA-6m68-r693-78qx", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/tilt-dev/tilt", "summary": "Tilt: Cross-site WebSocket hijacking of the Tilt HUD stream", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-19T13:53:37Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-6m68-r693-78qx", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.37.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/tilt-dev/tilt"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.24.0, <= 0.37.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Tilt: Cross-site WebSocket hijacking of the Tilt HUD stream
